page_metadata.biotools__summary: Estimator of epidemiological parameters under the Birth-Death with Contact Tracing (BD-CT) model from phylogenetic trees and a non-parametric CT detection test.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Estimator of epidemiological parameters under the Birth-Death with Partner Notification (BD-PN) model from phylogenetic trees and a non-parametric PN detection test.
